title: client.settings_update payload
description: PROTOCOL.md §5.15 — change settings (notably the LLM provider/model/API key). The api_key is sensitive: it travels ONLY on this client→server message and is never echoed back.

base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible / local / custom base URL; null to clear.

api_key.description: OPTIONAL — send only to set/replace the key; omit to keep the existing one.
